description: Create a side-by-side comparative dashboard in TiddlyWiki to compare different renewable energy sources. Create a new tiddler named 'Energy Comparison Dashboard' and tag it with 'Dashboard'. The dashboard must provide a mechanism to select and transclude the content of any two tiddlers tagged 'EnergySource' (Solar Power, Wind Power, Geothermal Energy, and Hydroelectric Power) for simultaneous side-by-side viewing.
